程序包 Face.Door

  • 类概要 
    类 说明
    CloseDoor
    远程关门
    HoldDoor
    门常开
    LockDoor
    锁定门
    OpenDoor
    远程开门
    OpenDoor_CheckNum
    验证码远程开门
    ReadExemptionVerificationOpen
    免验证开门_读取
    ReadExpirationPrompt
    权限到期提示参数——读取
    ReadReaderIntervalTime
    重复验证权限间隔——读取
    ReadReaderOption
    读卡器字节数_读取
    ReadRelayOption
    继电器参数_读取
    ReadUnlockingTime
    开锁时输出时长
    ReadVoiceBroadcastSetting
    设置语音播报功能_读取
    UnlockDoor
    解除锁定门
    WriteExemptionVerificationOpen
    免验证开门_写入
    WriteExpirationPrompt
    权限到期提示参数——写入
    WriteReaderIntervalTime
    设置重复验证权限间隔——写入
    WriteReaderOption
    读卡器字节数_写入
    WriteRelayOption
    继电器参数_写入
    WriteUnlockingTime
    开锁时输出时长
    WriteVoiceBroadcastSetting
    设置语音播报_写入
